titleStmt.title: SII 22.340: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 340. (A.R. No. 340 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJARĀJA I—20th YEAR (A.D. 1004-05)

summary.p: The inscription is damaged. It seems to register a sale of land about 947 kuḻi in extent, by the Ūrār of Amaṇpākkam to the temple at Gōvindapāḍi. It is stated that the cost of the land was paid by Ponvilli alias Vaishṇavadāsan, a resident of Kuṇḍūr who formed a flower garden out of it for god Śrī Krishṇa. The land was made tax-free by the Ūrār with the amount which had been deposited with them sometime previously.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap peruṉilac celviyuṉ taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi
veṅkaiñāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyuṉ taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaiñāṭuṅ kollamum kaliṅkamum
ḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamuṉ tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷellā
toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī korājarāja rājakesarivarma[ rāṉa rā] jarājadevarkku yāṇṭu Irupa
tāvatu maṇaiyil koṭṭattup paḷukūrnāṭṭu Amaṇpā ṅkaḷūr tenka
śrī govindapāṭi kku Iṟaiyiliya nila ṟ kellai ci
m vaṭukaṉṟur � ṇṭuṭaiya meṟkum ce
nāṟ ku vaṭakkum melpāṟke ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr nila
mākiya śrī kerā māṉa nandavanamāna kuṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pālā
ṟṟukkut teṟkum Innāṟpāṟkellaiyuḷḷum makappaṭṭaṉa ṉilam toḷaāyirattu nā
ṟpatteḻaraik kuḻiyu mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka krayadravyammaṟakkoṇṭu sarva parihāra Iṟai
yiliyāka candrādityavaṟ viṟṟukkuṭuttom muṉpu Idevarpakkal I bhūmi melai Iṟaikā
val Oṟṟiyākak koṇṭa poṉ 2 10 kalanākakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Amaṇ
pākkattūrom Ūrār colla Eḻutinen Ivvūrk karaṇattān kuvalai kiḻavaṉ vi
ḷamāntracotipaṭṭaṉ Ivai yenneḻuttu ... I bhūmi Āḻvār bhaṇḍārattu pon
kuṭuttu śrī kṛṣṇarkkut tirunandavanamāka koṇṭu vaittāṉ śrī rkāyañ ceykiṉṟa ku
ṇṭūr poṉvilliyākiya vaiṣṇavadāsan Idharmam rakṣippār śrīpādam Eṉṟalai
melaṉa ..itu śrī vaiṣṇavarakṣaiḥ
Digital edition of SII 22.340 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
